---
title: "02_QC_and_filtering,"
format: html
editor: visual
jupyter: python3
execute:
  python: /Users/air/bioenv/bin/python
---

```{r}
Sys.setenv(RETICULATE_PYTHON="/Users/air/bioenv/bin/python")

library(reticulate)

py_config()
```

```{python}
import sys
print(sys.executable)
```

```{python}
import pandas as pd

data = pd.read_csv("cga_brca_counts.csv")
sample = pd.read_csv("tcga_brca_sample_metadata.csv")
```

```{python}

```
